title: Visium Spatially Resolved Transcriptomics of Glioblastoma Samples
author: Heiland, Dieter Henrik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This repository contains samples (Visium Spatially resolved Transcriptomics) of the project entitled: Epigenetic neural glioblastoma integrates into neuron-to-glioma-networks and predicts therapeutic vulnerability
